en: Catherine, go find your weight over there.
That Colonel Jim is a tall glass of water.
That he is. Tall, strong, with a mandate.
Oh, and I bet he's like the day and night.
Mary, it's Sunday.
Please have some shame. I will not.
He's coming over. Now, why would he be doing that? Because Mary's waving at him.
No! Ladies, I'm not ready. It's too late. Fix your hair on the side.
Hello, Colonel.
I'm Dorothy Vaughn. That's Mary Jackson. I believe you've met her husband, Levi.
Yes, ma'am. Good to meet y'all. And this is Catherine Gold.
She's not married. She's a widow.
With three beautiful little girls. So well-behaved.
Angels on Earth is what we like to call them.
Dorothy, slice of pie? I'd love one.
Excuse me. We already have a slice of pie, Dorothy.
Everybody get ready.
No protocol for women attending. There's no protocol for a man circling the Earth either, sir.
Every time we have a chance to get ahead, they move the finish line.
Every time. We all get there. Together, we don't get there at all.
